verdict: Burt's Bees Pomegranate combines beeswax with antioxidant pomegranate extract and vitamin E for added skincare benefits. Strong natural formulation with functional botanicals justifies slightly higher cost within budget tier.

_research.name: Burt's Bees Pomegranate Lip Balm
pros: Vitamin E protects against oxidative stress
_research.con: Pomegranate extract may irritate extremely sensitive lips.
